title: Replication lag after wallet deploy
root_cause: v4.10.1 introduced unindexed query on transactions_log
resolution: rolled back to v4.9.8 then deployed fixed v4.10.2

title: Payment gateway timeouts
root_cause: upstream provider partial outage
resolution: switched to secondary payment provider, root cause resolved upstream

title: Transaction log disk 95% full
symptoms: disk_space critical alert; log writes slowing
root_cause: log rotation cron job failed silently for 6 days
resolution: manual log rotation; fixed cron monitoring

title: Auth latency p95>2s
root_cause: connection pool exhausted after traffic surge
resolution: increased pool size from 50 to 200; restart

title: Failed deploy caused 5xx spike
root_cause: missing schema migration in v3.3.9
resolution: rolled back to v3.3.8; migration applied; v3.3.9 redeployed

title: Replication lag during high traffic
root_cause: traffic surge during promotional event overwhelmed replica
resolution: added read replica; tuned replication batch size

title: Game state desync across nodes
root_cause: cache invalidation race condition
resolution: deployed hotfix v5.1.3; manual state reconciliation

title: Slow password reset emails
root_cause: SMTP provider rate limiting
resolution: increased email provider tier; added retry queue

title: Deposit success rate dropped
root_cause: payment provider certificate near expiry triggered cautious rejections
resolution: rotated certificate; engaged provider support

title: Bet acceptance latency
symptoms: p95 bet placement latency increased to 3.5s
root_cause: database stats stale after schema change
resolution: ran ANALYZE on affected tables; latency normalized

title: Cache stampede on warm-up
symptoms: elevated DB load on service restart
root_cause: no cache warming on deploy
resolution: added cache pre-warming step to deploy pipeline

title: Memory leak in session handler
root_cause: session objects not GC'd after timeout
resolution: deployed fixed session cleanup logic

title: Asset CDN cache miss storm
symptoms: asset latency p95>5s; player experience degraded
root_cause: CDN purge after deploy invalidated all assets simultaneously
resolution: phased CDN purge; warmed cache before traffic peak

title: Mirror failover required
root_cause: underlying EBS volume degraded
resolution: promoted mirror to primary; AWS replaced volume

title: Refund queue backlog
root_cause: worker pod OOM-killed twice
resolution: increased pod memory limits; added autoscaling

title: Bet placement outage
root_cause: DB connection exhaustion after dependency timeout
resolution: restarted service; added connection pool circuit breaker

title: Slow withdrawals
root_cause: third-party identity verification slow
resolution: added timeout + fallback verification path

title: Sporadic game freezes
root_cause: WebSocket library bug under load
resolution: patched library; deployed across env

title: Login failures regional
symptoms: logins failing only from EU traffic
root_cause: regional CDN config drift
resolution: reverted CDN config; added drift detection

title: Bet history query slow
root_cause: missing index on user_id+timestamp
resolution: added composite index; query time 200ms

title: Duplicate transaction risk
root_cause: key generation collision under high concurrency
resolution: switched to UUIDv7; replayed audit logs

title: Withdrawal rejection spike
root_cause: fraud rules deployed without staging review
resolution: rolled back rules; manual review queue cleared

title: Replica restart loop
symptoms: replica node restarted 4 times in 1 hour
root_cause: OOM after schema change increased row size
resolution: tuned innodb_buffer_pool_size; restored stability

title: Leaderboard not updating
root_cause: Redis cluster split-brain after network blip
resolution: re-elected primary; reduced failover timeout

title: 2FA SMS delays
symptoms: 2FA SMS delivery >2 min for 8% of users
root_cause: SMS provider degradation in EU region
resolution: failed over to backup SMS provider

title: Inconsistent balance display
root_cause: cache TTL too long after balance update
resolution: reduced TTL to 5s; added cache invalidation on write

title: Failed deposit retries piling up
root_cause: downstream provider 502s; retry logic too aggressive
resolution: exponential backoff implemented

title: Account lockout spike
root_cause: bot scanning campaign detected
resolution: WAF rule deployed; IP block list updated

title: Bet limits not enforced
root_cause: race condition between limit check and bet placement
resolution: added distributed lock on player ID

title: Slot game crash regional
symptoms: specific slot game crashing 100% of plays in EU
root_cause: incompatible asset version cached at EU CDN
resolution: purged CDN cache; emergency hotfix

title: Slow KYC document upload
root_cause: S3 multipart upload misconfigured
resolution: fixed multipart threshold and concurrency

title: Tournament leaderboard reset
symptoms: leaderboard reset to zero for 4 minutes
root_cause: Redis key collision during deploy
resolution: fixed key namespacing; restored from backup

title: Replication broken to read replica
root_cause: long-running transaction held lock through replication restart
resolution: rebuilt replica from snapshot

title: Cashout calculation off by cents
symptoms: small rounding errors in cashout amounts
root_cause: floating-point arithmetic in cashout calculation
resolution: moved to fixed-point decimal; audit pass clean
